event: non-traumatic acute subdural hematoma on the right hemisphere
soft-tissue infection of the craniotomy wound
surgical revision of soft tissues and trepanation defect
Gram-negative pathogens in cranial wound samples
MDR Acinetobacter baumannii in abscess samples
MDR Klebsiella pneumoniae in bronchoalveolar samples
colistin dose reduced to 2 MIU every 12 hours
intraventricular colistin reduced to 0.25 MIU once daily
intraventricular colistin resumed at 0.25 MIU once daily
intermittent dialysis via arteriovenous Cimino shunt
steady state achieved with 2 MIU three times daily
no neurological side effects from intraventricular colistin
